Docs

markdown-oxide: Personal Knowledge Management for your text editor.

Recommended Links

  • What is markdown-oxide?: An overview of PKM features
  • Getting-started guide

Quick Start

Get started with Markdown-oxide as fast as possible! (Mac + Linux)

Neovim

  • Arch Linux: pacman -S markdown-oxide
  • Nix: pkgs.markdown-oxide
cargo install --locked --git https://github.com/Feel-ix-343/markdown-oxide.git markdown-oxide

VSCode

Install from the VS Code marketplace.

Zed

Install via Zed extensions.

GitHub footer
